---
image: img/ppic_uzh_optimized.jpg
title: Etienne Compérat
subtitle: "<b>Predoctoral Fellow | UZH<br>JPE Replicator | UChicago</b>"
open-graph:
  type: profile
  url: https://ecomperat.github.io/
  locale: en_US
  profile:
    first_name: Étienne
    last_name: Compérat
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ecomperat
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/%C3%A9tienne-comp%C3%A9rat-a22850242/
    - text: "<b>UZH</b>"
      href: https://www.econ.uzh.ch/en/people/predocs/comperat.html
format:
  html:
    body-classes: home-compact
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<a href="#hero-heading" class="skip-link">Skip to main content</a>

Hi! I'm Etienne Compérat, a predoctoral fellow in the Department of Economics at the University of Zurich under the supervision of [Hans-Joachim Voth](https://www.jvoth.com/). Welcome to my website! ^[A special thanks to Paulo for his help in bringing this website to life! You can find his research portfolio tutorial [here](https://www.paulogcd.com/portfolio_tutorial/).]


:::{#hero-heading}

## Affiliations

<div class="inst-item" markdown="1">
  <img src="img/logo_uzh_opt.png" alt="University of Zurich logo" class="inst-logo" loading="lazy" width="42" height="42">
  <div class="inst-text">
**University of Zurich** | 2025 - Now<br>
Predoctoral Fellow in Economics
  </div>
</div>

<div class="inst-item" markdown="1">
  <img src="img/logo_uchicago.png" alt="University of Chicago logo" class="inst-logo" loading="lazy" width="42" height="42">
  <div class="inst-text">
**University of Chicago** | 2025 - Now<br>
Replicator, Journal of Political Economy
  </div>
</div>

## Education

<div class="inst-item" markdown="1">
  <img src="img/logo_scpo.png" alt="Sciences Po logo" class="inst-logo" loading="lazy" width="42" height="42">
  <div class="inst-text">
**Sciences Po** | 2023 - 2025<br>
M.Res. in Economics
  </div>
</div>

<div class="inst-item" markdown="1">
  <img src="img/logo_berkeley_opt.png" alt="University of California, Berkeley logo" class="inst-logo" loading="lazy" width="42" height="42">
  <div class="inst-text">
**University of California, Berkeley** | 2022 - 2023<br>
Exchange - Dept. of Agricultural & Resource Economics
  </div>
</div>

<div class="inst-item" markdown="1">
  <img src="img/logo_scpo.png" alt="Sciences Po logo" class="inst-logo" loading="lazy" width="42" height="42">
  <div class="inst-text">
**Sciences Po** | 2020 - 2023<br>
B.A. in Economics and Political Science
  </div>
</div>

**Research Interests:** <br> Political Economy, Economic History, Spatial/Regional Economics
:::

My research asks how modernisation reshaped the geography of development in nineteenth-century France. My doctoral project, **"Diffusion and Divergence: Railways, Schools, and the Modernisation of Rural France,"** studies how railway-induced market integration and mass primary education integrated rural areas into national markets, institutions, and language while also producing concentration, out-migration, and deindustrialisation in some places.

I recently completed a Research Master's in Economics at Sciences Po. My master's thesis, supervised by [Roberto Galbiati](https://sites.google.com/view/galbiatir1/) and [Emeric Henry](https://sites.google.com/site/emericmlhenry/home), studied the joint effects of primary schooling and municipal suffrage under the July Monarchy on local development, and was awarded Sciences Po's Prize for Best Master's Thesis (2024-2025).

Empirically, I construct historical datasets from archival, textual, administrative, and geospatial sources, combining GIS, OCR, computer vision, and reproducible workflows with modern causal-inference tools. During my predoctoral fellowship, I work on projects in economic history, political economy, and cultural economics, and I am also part of the [JPE replication team](https://jpe-reproducibility.github.io/replicator-team/) at UChicago under the supervision of [Florian Oswald](https://floswald.github.io/).

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Étienne Compérat",
  "jobTitle": "Predoctoral Fellow in Economics",
  "affiliation": [
    {
      "@type": "Organization",
      "name": "University of Zurich",
      "department": "Department of Economics",
      "url": "https://www.econ.uzh.ch/"
    },
    {
      "@type": "Organization",
      "name": "University of Chicago",
      "department": "Journal of Political Economy",
      "url": "https://jpe-reproducibility.github.io/"
    }
  ],
  "alumniOf": [
    {
      "@type": "EducationalOrganization",
      "name": "Sciences Po",
      "url": "https://www.sciencespo.fr/"
    },
    {
      "@type": "EducationalOrganization",
      "name": "University of California, Berkeley",
      "url": "https://www.berkeley.edu/"
    }
  ],
  "knowsAbout": [
    "Economic History",
    "Political Economy",
    "Spatial Economics",
    "Regional Economics",
    "Econometrics",
    "Causal Inference"
  ],
  "sameAs": [
    "https://github.com/ecomperat",
    "https://www.linkedin.com/in/étienne-compérat-a22850242/",
    "https://www.econ.uzh.ch/en/people/predocs/comperat.html"
  ],
  "url": "https://ecomperat.github.io",
  "image": "https://ecomperat.github.io/img/ppic_uzh_optimized.jpg"
}
</script>
